title: boswellia hirsuta
intro: Boswellia hirsuta, also known as the hairy frankincense tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Burseraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which are attributed to the presence of boswellic acids. The health benefits of Boswellia hirsuta include reducing inflammation, alleviating arthritis symptoms, and providing relief from gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Boswellia hirsuta include essential oils, extracts, and capsules, which can be obtained from the plant's resin, leaves, and roots.
